---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a feature, missing mechanic, or accuracy improvement
title: "[feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## What

A clear description of the feature or mechanic you want.

## Why

What it improves — accuracy to the original, usability, performance, etc.

## Original-game reference

If this is about matching ZUN's game, point to the behavior (decompilation
reference, video, or description of what the original does).

## Notes

Anything else — alternatives considered, related issues, rough implementation
ideas.
